title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF SALEM, MARION AND POLK COUNTIES SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers summer camps. 1395 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: June 15 - August 28, 2026 Email (503) 581-7383 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Support Services Center (503) 581-7383 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: See website FEES: Varies by camp Scholarships available DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion County, Polk County SITE HOURS: Program hours vary between school year and summer. TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of Summer and Hood Streets Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND DENTAL SERVICES LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
